MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ONEWEST BANK, FSB, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained, no opposition filed, with leave to amend to plead allegation in support of each cause of action.
